pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.6.3 to 3.3.4 to support Java 21 and modern Spring features.
Update the Maven Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
Rename the project artifact and name from 'example' to 'happycows' to reflect the specific application.
Update the project description to accurately describe the application as a simulation game.
pom.xml.human_impl: <description>A Simulation Game of the Tragedy of the Commons.</description>

pom.xml.general_idea: Add a Maven property for target classes to assist with testing or code generation scope.
Remove the Spring Boot MongoDB starter dependency, likely switching to a different data store or removing persistence.
Upgrade Spring Cloud Gateway MVC to version 4.1.3 to align with Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
Replace deprecated Springfox Swagger dependencies with SpringDoc OpenAPI for API documentation.
Add Microsoft Playwright dependency for end-to-end browser testing.
Add WireMock dependency for stubbing HTTP services during testing.
Add Awaitility dependency to simplify asynchronous testing patterns.
Explicitly add Spring Security Config dependency to manage security context in async threads.
Add Apache Commons CSV dependency for handling CSV data processing.
Configure Maven compiler plugin to use full annotation processing.
Configure Surefire plugin with TCP fork node to fix event transmission issues in tests.
Add Git Commit ID plugin to generate git properties for build information.
Upgrade JaCoCo Maven plugin to version 0.8.10 for better Java 21 support.
Update JaCoCo exclusion patterns to match the new package structure (happiercows).

.gitignore.general_idea: Add an alternative directory name for Storybook static output to .gitignore to prevent accidental commits.
Add macOS .DS_Store files to .gitignore to prevent cluttering the repository with local metadata.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the base Docker image from a Maven-bundled JDK 11 image to a standalone Liberica JDK 21 Alpine image to support Java 21.
Replace Debian-based apt-get package installation with Alpine-based apk add commands due to the switch to an Alpine Linux base image.
Install Maven explicitly via apk since the new base image does not include it, ensuring the build tool is available.
Install Node.js using nvm to ensure a specific, modern version (16.20.0) is available for frontend builds, replacing the old NodeSource setup.
Install libstdc++ to provide necessary C++ standard library dependencies for native modules or tools running on Alpine.
Install git to support build steps or configuration that rely on git metadata or commands.
Update the build command to use Maven's batch mode and skip tests during the Docker image build phase for efficiency.
Define a specific entrypoint to run the generated JAR file, replacing the generic bash shell command.
